assertions.assertion: The code calls .AddSaml() on the IdentityServer builder chain
assertions.rationale: Code clearly shows .AddSaml() chained on the IdentityServer builder.

assertions.assertion: No separate NuGet package is added — SAML is built into Duende.IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states no additional NuGet package is needed and existing Duende.IdentityServer 8.0.0 includes SAML.

assertions.assertion: A SamlServiceProvider is created with EntityId set to 'https://crm.contoso.com'
The code mentions or uses AddInMemorySamlServiceProviders to register the SP
